item.name: Retrieve a label for a specific parcel

request.name: Retrieve a label for a specific parcel

description.content: You will receive URLs to download the labels in PDF format, for both normal and label printers. You can get the `id` of a parcel from the [Create a parcel or parcels](/api/v2/parcels/create-a-parcel-or-parcels) endpoint.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Request multiple shipping labels for an array of parcels at the same time. You will receive URLs to download the labels in PDF format, for both normal and label printers.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Retrieve a shipping label for a specific parcel in PDF format for a normal printer.

query.description:
(Required) The position of the label on an A4 page.

0 - Top left
1 - Top right
2 - Bottom left
3 - Bottom right

Once a parcel has been announced, you can use the **Labels API** to request a PDF shipping label in order to print it and attach it to the box.
